title: Search doctors by specialization and view matching results
description: Verifies a logged-in patient can search by specialization and see a list of matching doctors.

steps.description: Click on the "Doctors" link in the main navigation
Verify element "Search results list" is visible

title: Search doctors by doctor name and open doctor details
description: Verifies a logged-in patient can search by a doctor's name, open a doctor card, and see profile/availability information.

steps.description: Click on the "Doctors" link in the main navigation
Verify element "Doctor result card" is visible
Click on the first visible doctor card

title: Search with unknown term shows No results found message
description: Verifies the UI displays a clear empty-state message when no doctors match the search query.

steps.description: Click on the "Doctors" link in the main navigation
Verify text "No results found" is visible

title: Submitting an empty search shows validation or does not change results unexpectedly
description: Verifies the search action with an empty query provides user feedback or keeps the page in a stable state.

steps.description: Click on the "Doctors" link in the main navigation
Verify element "Doctors page results area" is visible

title: Search query is case-insensitive for specialization
description: Verifies searching with different letter casing returns results (or at minimum does not break the UI).

steps.description: Click on the "Doctors" link in the main navigation
Verify element "Search results list" is visible

title: Search handles leading/trailing spaces in query
description: Verifies the search input tolerates extra spaces and still returns results or stable empty-state.

steps.description: Click on the "Doctors" link in the main navigation
Type "  Neurologist  " into the search field
Verify element "Search results list" is visible

title: Search results remain visible after scrolling the results list
description: Verifies that a longer results view remains usable when the user scrolls and does not lose context.

steps.description: Click on the "Doctors" link in the main navigation
Verify element "Search results list" is visible
Scroll to the bottom of the results section
Verify element "Search results list" is visible

title: Doctor profile view shows identifiable doctor information
description: Verifies that opening a doctor from results shows key profile information in a visible state.

steps.description: Click on the "Doctors" link in the main navigation
Verify element "Doctor result card" is visible
Click on the first visible doctor card

title: Search hospitals by typing a valid location
description: Verifies a user can search for nearby hospitals by entering a location and viewing results.

steps.description: Click on "Hospitals" in the main navigation
Verify element "Hospital results list" is visible

title: View hospital details from a hospital card
description: Verifies clicking a hospital card shows details including services and contact information.

steps.description: Click on "Hospitals" in the main navigation
Verify element "Hospital results list" is visible
Click on the first hospital card in the results list

title: Invalid location shows 'No hospitals found' message
description: Verifies an invalid/unrecognized location returns an empty state message.

steps.description: Click on "Hospitals" in the main navigation
Verify text "No hospitals found" is visible

title: Search with empty location input shows validation or does not run search
description: Verifies the search flow handles an empty location input gracefully.

steps.description: Click on "Hospitals" in the main navigation
Verify text "No hospitals found" is visible

title: Hospital details page/section displays directions option
description: Verifies that hospital details expose a directions entry point for navigation assistance.

steps.description: Click on "Hospitals" in the main navigation
Verify element "Hospital results list" is visible
Click on the first hospital card in the results list

title: Book an appointment and see booking confirmation
description: Verifies a patient can book an appointment with a doctor and receives an on-screen booking confirmation.

steps.description: Click on a doctor from the doctor list

title: Booked appointment appears in dashboard booking details
description: Verifies that after confirming a booking, the dashboard shows booking details for the appointment.

steps.description: Click on a doctor from the doctor list

title: Attempt to book a timeslot that is unavailable shows error
description: Verifies the system prevents booking when a selected timeslot becomes unavailable and displays the correct error message.

steps.description: Click on a doctor from the doctor list
Click on a timeslot labeled as unavailable or no longer available

title: Confirm Booking button remains disabled until a timeslot is selected
description: Verifies that users cannot confirm a booking without selecting a timeslot first.

steps.description: Click on a doctor from the doctor list
Verify text "Select a timeslot" is visible

title: Changing selected timeslot updates the pending booking selection before confirmation
description: Verifies that selecting a different timeslot updates what will be booked prior to confirmation.

steps.description: Click on a doctor from the doctor list
Click on a different available timeslot

title: Booking confirmation shows the chosen doctor and timeslot information
description: Verifies the confirmation view includes visible details for the selected doctor and appointment time.

steps.description: Click on a doctor from the doctor list

title: Booking confirmation persists on dashboard view after completion
description: Verifies that after booking, the dashboard shows a visible indication of the booked appointment (e.g., upcoming appointment section).

steps.description: Click on a doctor from the doctor list

title: Emergency page loads and SOS control is present for authenticated user
description: Verifies the Emergency page is reachable via UI navigation after login and the SOS button is visible.

steps.description: Click on the "Emergency" link in the main navigation

title: AI chat returns a response for a general medical query
description: Verifies a logged-in user can send a medical question and see an AI response appear in the chat.

steps.description: Click on the "AI Chat" or "Chat" navigation item
Type "What are common causes of a mild headache?" into the chat message input field
Verify text "What are common causes of a mild headache?" is visible
Verify an element "AI response message" is visible

title: AI chat follow-up question and refined advice after additional details
description: Verifies the AI asks a clarifying question and then provides refined advice after the user adds more symptom details.

steps.description: Click on the "AI Chat" or "Chat" navigation item
Type "I have a sore throat and mild fever. What could it be?" into the chat message input field
Verify text "I have a sore throat and mild fever. What could it be?" is visible
Verify an element "AI response message" is visible
Type "It started yesterday, no cough, and I have difficulty swallowing." into the chat message input field
Verify text "It started yesterday, no cough, and I have difficulty swallowing." is visible
Verify an element "AI response message" is visible

title: Send button disabled or no message sent when input is empty
description: Verifies the chat prevents sending an empty message and does not add a blank user message to the conversation.

steps.description: Click on the "AI Chat" or "Chat" navigation item
Click on the chat message input field
Verify text "Unable to fetch AI response" is not visible

title: Message with only spaces is not sent
description: Verifies the chat prevents sending whitespace-only messages.

steps.description: Click on the "AI Chat" or "Chat" navigation item
Type "     " into the chat message input field
Verify text "Unable to fetch AI response" is not visible

title: Long query can be submitted and does not break chat rendering
description: Verifies the UI accepts a longer medical query and displays both the user message and an AI response.

steps.description: Click on the "AI Chat" or "Chat" navigation item

Type "For the last 3 days I have had intermittent fever, body aches, and fatigue. I also have mild nausea but no vomiting. I took paracetamol twice. What are possible causes and when should I see a doctor?" into the chat message input field
Verify text "For the last 3 days I have had intermittent fever, body aches, and fatigue." is visible
Verify an element "AI response message" is visible

title: Multiple sequential messages remain visible in correct order
description: Verifies the chat supports a multi-turn exchange by showing each new user message and corresponding AI response.

steps.description: Click on the "AI Chat" or "Chat" navigation item
Type "Is it safe to take ibuprofen for a fever?" into the chat message input field
Verify text "Is it safe to take ibuprofen for a fever?" is visible
Verify an element "AI response message" is visible
Type "What about paracetamol instead?" into the chat message input field
Verify text "What about paracetamol instead?" is visible
Verify an element "AI response message" is visible

title: Press Enter to send a message (keyboard submission)
description: Verifies a user can submit a message using the Enter key and see an AI response.

steps.description: Click on the "AI Chat" or "Chat" navigation item
Type "How much water should an adult drink daily?" into the chat message input field
Verify text "How much water should an adult drink daily?" is visible
Verify an element "AI response message" is visible

title: Update personal information successfully from Profile page
description: Verifies a logged-in user can edit personal information and sees a success message after saving.

steps.description: Click the "Profile" link in the main navigation
Type "Updated Name" into the full name field

title: Show validation errors when contact fields have invalid values
description: Verifies the Profile form blocks save and shows field-level validation messages for invalid contact inputs.

steps.description: Click the "Profile" link in the main navigation
Type "123" into the phone number field
Verify element "Email error message" is visible
Verify element "Phone number error message" is visible

title: Attempt to save with required personal info cleared shows required-field errors
description: Verifies required fields cannot be left blank and appropriate validation is shown.

steps.description: Click the "Profile" link in the main navigation
Type "" into the full name field
Verify element "Full name required error message" is visible

title: Cancel/discard edits by leaving Profile page without saving
description: Verifies that unsaved changes are not persisted when the user navigates away and returns to the Profile page.

steps.description: Click the "Profile" link in the main navigation
Type "Temp Unsaved Name" into the full name field
Click the "Dashboard" link in the main navigation
Click the "Profile" link in the main navigation
Verify text "Temp Unsaved Name" is not visible

title: Saving profile updates shows updated values on reload of Profile page
description: Verifies that saved profile changes persist and remain visible when returning to the Profile page in the same session.

steps.description: Click the "Profile" link in the main navigation
Type "Persistent Name" into the full name field
Click the "Dashboard" link in the main navigation
Click the "Profile" link in the main navigation

title: Profile picture upload control is present on Profile page (no file upload execution)
description: Verifies the UI presents an option to change/upload profile picture without executing a file picker interaction.

steps.description: Click the "Profile" link in the main navigation
Verify element "Change/Upload profile picture control" is visible
